construction.panels: Standard baseball jersey construction with set-in sleeves. Features a full-button front placket.
construction.seams: Standard flat stitching throughout, matching the body color. No visible contrast stitching.
construction.closures: Full-button front placket with 6 white, round buttons.
construction.details: V-neck collar. White piping detail runs along the edge of the V-neck and down both sides of the front placket. Sleeves feature double white stripe trim on the cuffs. The hem is straight.

graphics.size: approximately 13 inches wide x 3.5 inches tall (at center)

branding.primary_logo: Small woven label with a purple/pinkish background, likely featuring the SkyyRose logo, located at the interior back neck.
branding.secondary_marks: A rectangular woven patch on the lower right front. The patch has a brown/gold background with 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' text in white, and a stylized baseball-inspired graphic (possibly a shield or diamond shape with initials) in white and black. Below this, there is smaller, illegible text, likely care instructions or a brand motto. This patch is stitched onto the garment.

fabric_appearance: Smooth athletic jersey knit, possibly a polyester blend, with a subtle sheen typical of sports jerseys.
unique_features: The prominent 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' graphic serves as a powerful statement. The 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' patch on the lower front adds a distinct brand identifier and collection specific detail, reminiscent of classic sports league patches. The overall design is 'SF inspired', hinting at San Francisco baseball aesthetics.
collection_aesthetic: dark luxury, Oakland grit, emotional expression
